title: phegopteris cyclocarpa
intro: Phegopteris cyclocarpa, also known as the cyclocarpus fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. The cyclocarpus fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable remedy in the treatment of various ailments. The herbal preparations of Phegopteris cyclocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
